ITC Ltd

ITC Summary Chart Analysis Peers Quarters Profit & Loss Balance Sheet Cash Flow Ratios Investors Documents

ITC Ltd

₹ 290 0.02%
03 Jul - close price
itcportal.com BSE: 500875 NSE: ITC
About

Established in 1910, ITC is the largest cigarette manufacturer and seller in the country. ITC operates in four business segments at present — FMCG Cigarettes, FMCG Others, Paperboards, Paper and Packaging, and Agri Business. [1]

Key Points

Business Segments FY26 [1]

Website BSE NSE
  • Market Cap ₹ 3,63,292 Cr.
  • Current Price ₹ 290
  • High / Low ₹ 427 / 275
  • Stock P/E 17.4
  • Book Value ₹ 57.9
  • Dividend Yield 5.00 %
  • ROCE 38.9 %
  • ROE 29.3 %
  • Face Value ₹ 1.00
Edit ratios

Pros

  • Company is almost debt free.
  • Stock is providing a good dividend yield of 5.00%.
  • Company has a good return on equity (ROE) track record: 3 Years ROE 35.2%
  • Company has been maintaining a healthy dividend payout of 74.5%

Cons

  • The company has delivered a poor sales growth of 9.87% over past five years.

* The pros and cons are machine generated. Pros / cons are based on a checklist to highlight important points. Please exercise caution and do your own analysis.

Documents

Announcements

All
  • Compliances-Certificate under Reg. 74 (5) of SEBI (DP) Regulations, 2018
    2d - ITC filed Regulation 74(5) certificate for quarter ended 30 June 2026.
  • Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Newspaper Publication
    1 Jul - Publication of Notice re: completion of despatch of the Notice of the 115th Annual General Meeting.
  • Business Responsibility and Sustainability Reporting (BRSR)
    26 Jun - ITC filed 2025-26 annual report, BRSR, and AGM notice for 23 July 2026.
  • Notice Of 115Th Annual General Meeting Of The Company 26 Jun
  • Reg. 34 (1) Annual Report.
    26 Jun - ITC filed FY26 annual report, business responsibility report, and notice for 115th AGM on 23 July 2026.
